global.description: The ad features a bold message encouraging users to win rewards while playing with friends.
global.main_message: Win epic rewards by playing with friends.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: PixelForge logo
elements.description: A simple logo with the text 'PixelForge' in a modern font, positioned at the top left corner.

elements.label: Top decorative element
elements.description: A decorative element with a light background, possibly abstract shapes or patterns, occupying the top area.

elements.description: Another decorative element similar to the previous one, located next to it in the top area.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: The main text reads 'Win epic rewards' in a bold, eye-catching font, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Sub-message
elements.description: A smaller text below the main message that says 'Play with friends tonight', also centered.
